creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: While tarballs and Git tags have been there, the announce email was sent 2023-04-14T20:17Z only, see https://sourceforge.net/p/openvpn/mailman/message/37804029/ - and the presence of a tarball is not a sufficient sign of a release because sometimes these are re-rolled (not for v2.6.3 though).
